import torch
from speechbrain.inference.enhancement import SpectralMaskEnhancement

enhance_model = SpectralMaskEnhancement.from_hparams(
    source='speechbrain/metricgan-plus-voicebank',
    savedir='/opt/pretrained_models/metricgan-plus-voicebank',
)

print('hparams.enhance_model:', enhance_model.hparams.enhance_model)
print('type:', type(enhance_model.hparams.enhance_model))
print('dir:', [x for x in dir(enhance_model.hparams.enhance_model) if not x.startswith('__')])

# Try to call it
gen = enhance_model.hparams.enhance_model
print('gen:', gen)

# Try a forward pass
wav = torch.randn(1, 16000)
lengths = torch.tensor([1.0])
try:
    out = gen(wav, lengths)
    print('forward pass shape:', out.shape)
except Exception as e:
    print('forward error:', e)
    try:
        out = gen(wav)
        print('forward pass (no lengths) shape:', out.shape)
    except Exception as e2:
        print('forward error2:', e2)
